v_ticket_sla_performance

INSERT into fact table
Delete from quarantine

Retry up to MAX_RETRIES
Promote after 24h window

INSERT INTO dim_*
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

- Derive date_key, time_key
- Calculate SLA metrics
- Lookup region_id from orders
INSERT INTO fact_*

span.p:
Columns match?
Datatypes valid?
Nulls enforced?
Categoricals allowed?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Quarantine ALL records
Mark file failed

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Batch Records Validation
- Nulls
- Empties
- Duplicates
- Date/Email/Phone formats
- Numeric ranges

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Stream Records Validation
- Nulls (ignore old_status)
- Empties
- Duplicates
- Date formats
- Monetary ranges ≥ 0

span.p:
Orphan Validation
FK checks via Postgres
- customer_id → dim_customer
- order_id → fact_order
- etc.

SHA-256 hash on
email, phone, national_id
